message:
feat(clipboard): global clipboard polyfill for all frames

- Add clipboard_polyfill.js injected via Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument
- Hooks writeText, write, readText, execCommand, copy/cut events
- Enables paste via browser menu using host clipboard
- Request/response pattern: browser requests clipboard, host responds via pbpaste
- Remove per-page clipboard injection in favor of global polyfill
- Works in all frames including Monaco iframes
